meaning: Queen's Police Medal (英国)女王公安勋章
examples: This is an extension for the research of QPM.
Quality protein maize (QPM) is a sort of nutrition balanced maize.
In view of the cost and practicability, the molecular marker selection technique was thought to be effective in breeding for QPM.
Det Ch Supt Tony Porter, head of the Greater Manchester Police Counter Terrorism Unit, has received a Queen's Police Medal (QPM).
